title: Rubio Says That U.S. Is Still Open to Diplomacy With Iran
summary_full: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Iran had signaled it wanted to negotiate. Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman said Tehran had received new proposals from mediators.
summary_public: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Iran had signaled it wanted to negotiate. Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman said Tehran had received new proposals from mediators.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Rubio Says That U.S. Is Still Open to Diplomacy With Iran
